## ZipFileTree.ZipFileTreeAccessors.fileIsMutable() method

Returns a boolean indicating whether this file can be saved.

**Signature:**

```typescript
fileIsMutable(__path: string): DetailedResult<boolean, FileTree.SaveDetail>;
```
